instruction: Describe the affected applications and versions in a clear manner.
input: A vulnerability has been identified in JT2Go (All versions < V13.1.0), Teamcenter Visualization (All versions < V13.1.0). Affected applications lack proper validation of user-supplied data when parsing of PCX files. This could result in a heap-based buffer overflow. An attacker could leverage this vulnerability to execute code in the context of the current process.
output: The vulnerability affects all versions of JT2Go and Teamcenter Visualization below version 13.1.0. Users are advised to update to the latest version to mitigate the risk.
